$ $WARPCTRL completions bash                                                                                                                                                                                   |          warpctrl__action__help__list)                                                                                                                                                                          |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -f "${cur}"))                                                                                                                                                         |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "json ndjson pretty text" -- "${cur}"))                                                                                                                            |                  return 0                                                                                                                                                                                       |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -f "${cur}"))                                                                                                                                                         |                      ;;                                                                                                                                                                                         |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -f "${cur}"))

    local i cur prev opts cmd                                                                                                                                                                                  |              if [[ ${cur} == -* || ${COMP_CWORD} -eq 4 ]] ; then                                                                                                                                                |                      ;;                                                                                                                                                                                         |                      ;;                                                                                                                                                                                         |              case "${prev}" in                                                                                                                                                                                  |                      ;;                                                                                                                                                                                         |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -f "${cur}"))                                                                                                                                                         |                      ;;

            ",$1")                                                                                                                                                                                             |              if [[ ${cur} == -* || ${COMP_CWORD} -eq 3 ]] ; then                                                                                                                                                |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -f "${cur}"))                                                                                                                                                         |              case "${prev}" in                                                                                                                                                                                  |              case "${prev}" in                                                                                                                                                                                  |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -f "${cur}"))                                                                                                                                                         |              esac                                                                                                                                                                                               |                      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -f "${cur}"))
